title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Lulu Hypermarket India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Lulu Hypermarket India in Raipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Lulu Hypermarket India:
Lulu Hypermarket India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lulu Hypermarket India!
